commit_message:
Fix: close #1 Serial port does not mount on MacOS Fix: close #1 Serial port does not mount on MacOS This change fixed the USB mounting of the serial endpoint for me. I haven't done much testing, but the loopback seems to be working ok on two Mojave instances (laptop and desktop).

Next up... I'm going to see if I can get it connected to the picosoc example.
